title: psorospermum periclitatum
intro: Psorospermum periclitatum, also known as the 'Negrito tree', is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments.
